author: phase-4-coordinator
content:
Implemented broadcasting for ferray-core ops.rs operators (issue #346). Changes:

1. Added `Dimension::from_dim_slice(&[usize]) -> Option<Self>` trait method on the Dimension trait, with impls for Ix0..Ix6, IxDyn, and Shape1..Shape6 (static_shape).

2. Updated `elementwise_binary` in ferray-core/src/ops.rs to NumPy-broadcast within the same rank — same-shape inputs take the fast path (zip iter), mismatched shapes go through broadcast_shapes + broadcast_to. Reconstructs the result Dimension via from_dim_slice.

3. Added cross-rank broadcasting helper methods on Array: `add_broadcast`, `sub_broadcast`, `mul_broadcast`, `div_broadcast`, `rem_broadcast`. These accept any other-D operand and return Array<T, IxDyn> since the result rank is only known at runtime. Handles the canonical NumPy example from the issue: 1D + 2D column → 2D matrix.

4. Added 12 new tests covering same-rank broadcast (col+row → 2D, axis stretching, 3D), incompatible shape errors, and all 5 cross-rank broadcast methods.

5. Adjacent cleanup: fixed 5 preexisting clippy errors (1 redundant closure in tests/oracle.rs, 4 approx_constant false positives in dtype/promotion.rs by changing 3.14 to 2.5).

Result: 28 ops tests passing (12 new + 16 existing), 427 total ferray-core tests passing, full workspace builds and tests pass. Clippy clean. Closing as completed.
